🔗 Similar LC Problems

Visualize how problems relate by topic, pattern & difficulty — built for Google SWE interview prep

8 Hover to inspect · click tag node to filter table ↓
Width of each flow = number of problems. Click a tag to populate the filtered table below.
Click node to expand/collapse · drag to pan · scroll to zoom
Drag to brush-select → filters table ↓
Each dot = one problem. X-axis = difficulty tier. Y-axis = acceptance %. Brush to select.
Click bubble → filter table ↓
Each bubble = one topic tag. Hover for stats. Click to filter the table below.
Drag to pan · scroll to zoom · click node to open LeetCode
Problems linked when sharing ≥ N tags. Thicker edge = more shared tags. Node size = connections. Colors = cluster.
BFS Traversal Order
📋 Filtered Problems
#▼ Title↕ Difficulty↕ Acceptance↕ Tags
